MINIONLIB-PET_GIFT_ATTACK_POWER.title: Pet Feed (Legacy)
MINIONLIB-ATTACKAKA_GIFT_POWER.title: Attackaka Supply
MINIONLIB-ATTACKAKA_GIFT_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, add {Amount} [gold]Attackaka Strike[/gold] to your hand.
MINIONLIB-ATTACKAKA_GIFT_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your turn, add {Amount} [gold]Attackaka Strike[/gold] to your hand.
MINIONLIB-DEFENSEAKA_GIFT_POWER.title: Defenseaka Supply
MINIONLIB-DEFENSEAKA_GIFT_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, add {Amount} [gold]Defenseaka Guard[/gold] to your hand.
MINIONLIB-DEFENSEAKA_GIFT_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, add {Amount} [gold]Defenseaka Guard[/gold] to your hand.
MINIONLIB-PET_ATTACKER_POWER.title: Attacker
MINIONLIB-PET_ATTACKER_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Attack Point[/gold].
MINIONLIB-PET_ATTACKER_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Attack Point[/gold].
MINIONLIB-PET_ATTACK_POINT.title: Attack Point
MINIONLIB-PET_ATTACK_POINT.description: [gold]Action[/gold]: Attack 1 enemy for 0 damage (scaled by Strength). Spend 1 per attack.
MINIONLIB-PET_ATTACK_POINT.smartDescript: [gold]Action[/gold]: Attack 1 enemy for 0 damage (scaled by Strength). Spend 1 per attack.
MINIONLIB-PET_DEFENDER_POWER.title: Defender
MINIONLIB-PET_DEFENDER_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Defense Point[/gold].
MINIONLIB-PET_DEFENDER_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Defense Point[/gold].
MINIONLIB-MINION_GUARDIAN_POWER.title: Guardian
MINIONLIB-MINION_GUARDIAN_POWER.descript: Stand [gold]in front of[/gold] you, blocking damage for you. When gaining [gold]Block[/gold], gain that much [gold]Health[/gold].
MINIONLIB-MINION_GUARDIAN_POWER.smartDes: Stand [gold]in front of[/gold] you, blocking damage for you. When gaining [gold]Block[/gold], gain that much [gold]Health[/gold].
MINIONLIB-PET_DEFENSE_POINT.title: Defense Point
MINIONLIB-PET_DEFENSE_POINT.description: [gold]Action[/gold]: Choose 1 player and grant Block equal to this creature's Dexterity. Spend 1 per use.
MINIONLIB-PET_DEFENSE_POINT.smartDescrip: [gold]Action[/gold]: Choose 1 player and grant Block equal to this creature's Dexterity. Spend 1 per use.
